hero.title: Depth in every drop.
hero.description: Premium cold brew concentrate, crafted for those who take their coffee seriously. Just add water.

point1.title: Simple by design
point1.description: No equipment. No guesswork. Mix with water, milk, or oat — coffee exactly how you like it, every time.

point2.title: Uncompromising quality
point2.description: Cold-brewed slowly for 20 hours. Every batch is smooth, never bitter, never rushed.

point3.title: Made for your routine
point3.description: Four flavours, one format. Take it black, with oat milk, over ice, or blended — Deepwell fits your routine.

step1.title: Fill your glass
step1.description: Add ice to a glass — the more the better for a perfectly cold brew.

step2.title: Pour the concentrate
step2.description: Add 1 part Deepwell concentrate. A standard serving is about 60ml.

step3.title: Add your liquid
step3.description: Top with 2 parts water, oat milk, whole milk, or almond — your choice.

step4.title: Enjoy
step4.description: Stir gently and enjoy. No equipment, no waiting, no compromise.

post1.title: Cold Brew vs Iced Coffee
post1.excerpt: They look the same in the glass. But the process — and the result — could not be more different.

post2.title: The Perfect Summer Coffee
post2.excerpt: What makes a coffee feel like summer? We break down the elements of the perfect warm-weather cup.

post3.title: Where Coffee Comes From
post3.excerpt: From Ethiopian highlands to your glass — a journey through the origins of the world's favourite drink.

footer.brandDescription: Premium cold brew concentrate. Crafted for those who take their coffee seriously.
footer.credit: A concept brand by Reden Studio.

q3.text: How do you take your coffee?

original.name: Original
original.description: Smooth, balanced, and endlessly reliable — just like your daily rhythm.

vanilla.name: Vanilla
vanilla.description: Soft, sweet, and quietly versatile — a gentle constant in your day.

caramel.name: Caramel
caramel.description: Warm, indulgent, and made for sharing good moments.

mocha.name: Mocha
mocha.description: Bold, rich, and always ready to power through.

hazelnut.name: Hazelnut
hazelnut.description: Nutty, curious, and a little unexpected — just like you.

coconut.name: Coconut
coconut.description: Light, breezy, and at home wherever the day takes you.
